channel.title: Media Recommendations
channel.description: Curated media recs from newsletters, filtered by Claude

item.title: [TheReveal] In Review: '28 Years Later,' 'Elio'
item.description:
A zombie classic gets a decades-later sequel that doesn't play by the rules and Pixar delivers a pleasant kids' film.l

Review section with clear recommendations for two films with evaluative framing.

item.title: [TheReveal] #59: ‘Sans Soleil’: The Reveal discusses all 100 of Sight & Sound’s Greatest Films of All Time
item.description:
Chris Marker's unclassifiable cinematic essay circles the world in search of wonders while pondering the nature of memory, history, and time.

Curated discussion of a specific film from a ranked list of greatest films.

item.title: [TheReveal] In Review: 'Materialists,' 'Echo Valley'
item.description:
Celine Song follows up 'Past Lives' with a look at love and money in modern New York while Julianne Moore and Sydney Sweeney try to spark some acting fireworks as a troubled mother/daughter team.

Review section recommending two films with descriptive framing.
